post.body: I enjoyed the limelight last night! And i didnt get drunk! It rocked. Its times like this that make me sit back and think about how good life can be. I just gotta start saving more money!

children.body: I was thinking maybe somewhere other than the limelight... you know, just for a change.
children.author: obsolete_mind

comments.body:
I enjoyed it too, I had a great time.

And I love the photo.
Thankyou.

Was thinking, we should meet up soon and exchange America photos, and I can get that music off you again.

Velma
comments.author: chrissyk_lotn
